text.p: Pls, it's me , good day. There are so many mistakes in the paper I submitted for the conference at . This arose because I was down so it was a friend who assisted to type and send the paper. This accounted for the numerous errors; no referencing in the body and the final parts of the paper.
I will be glad if you can grant me the opporunity to do the corrections

It's me ,, graduate student, from Literature-in-English, ’s friend. I'm mostly grateful to be a part of this conference. I couldn't take your name for another fellow the first time I saw it in the call for paper thing on the net.
